projects.title: Barista AI
projects.description:
Navigating financial markets requires more than just raw data; it requires synthesizing macro-economics, global trends, and mathematical risk metrics into actionable insights. To solve this, I built **Barista AI**, a platform that leverages multi-agent AI architecture to act as a personal, highly analytical financial advisor.
 Here are a few highlights of what I built:
- ***High-Performance Data Ingestion:*** Engineered a robust multi-source data pipeline (Finnhub, Alpha Vantage, yfinance, FRED) with intelligent fallbacks. By implementing async batching and parallel threading, I reduced market data latency by up to **22.8x** (down to under 300ms)! 
-***Agentic AI Analysis:*** Integrated Google Gemini to power specialized AI agents (Market Monitor, Risk Analyzer, Rebalancing Advisor) that digest real-time metrics (VaR, CVaR, Sharpe) to provide clear, actionable portfolio strategies.
 - ***Sleek & Unified UI:*** Built a highly responsive, dark-mode-first dashboard using Next.js and Tailwind, served entirely from a unified FastAPI Python backend.
Deploying this to **HuggingFace Spaces** using a custom multi-stage **Docker** pipeline was a massive learning experience in modern CI/CD and containerization.

projects.title: Ragbot Merlin
projects.description: RAG-powered assistant for domain knowledge retrieval with context-grounded answers and semantic search.

projects.title: Financial LLM Copilot
projects.description:
Finance-focused copilot for analysis, summarization, and decision support over market and report data. 
 Using Streamlit and Mistral-7B (QLoRA), an AI-driven financial copilot was designed that uses concentrated GGUF model inference to provide real-time macroeconomic insights for over 80 countries and 12 key indicators.
 -Created a reliable data triangulation engine that combines economic data from the World Bank, OECD, and FRED and uses a unique validation algorithm to guarantee data consensus and assign confidence scores.
-In order to dynamically inject multi-source financial data into LLM prompts and enable advanced regional analysis and comparative metrics for seven global regions, a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline was engineered.

projects.title: Stock Prediction Platform
projects.description:
QuantEdge is a comprehensive stock prediction and backtesting engine designed for global markets. The platform enables traders and investors to:
 - **Validate tickers** from 30+ international exchanges with automatic regional benchmark mapping. 
 - **Track real-time prices** for 6 global indices (S&P 500, STOXX Europe 600, ASX 200, CSI 300, NIFTY 50, JSE All Share). 
- **Run backtests** with customizable strategies using vectorbt, calculating Sharpe ratio, max drawdown, and Alpha/Beta vs regional benchmarks. 
 - **Generate predictions** using LSTM neural networks trained on historical OHLCV data. 
 - **Convert currencies** across 17 supported currencies with live exchange rates.
 **Key Technical Achievements:
 -Implemented TwelveData API fallback for cloud deployments where yfinance is blocked (Yahoo IP restrictions).
 - Built rate-limiting system to respect free-tier API limits (8 calls/minute).
 - Achieved sub-second API response times with multi-tier caching strategy.
- Configured multi-stage Docker build for seamless HuggingFace Spaces deployment

projects.title: Option Pricing
projects.description:
-Using Python and Flask, I designed a professional-grade quantitative analysis platform that uses Black-Scholes, Monte Carlo (GBM), and Binomial Tree models to price European, American, and path-dependent options (Asian, Barrier, and Lookback).
- Developed a high-performance real-time options chain engine that offers instantaneous Greeks analysis (Delta, Gamma, Theta, and Vega) and implied volatility metrics for more than 30 countries worldwide. This engine uses optimized endpoint fetching to reduce data load times by 50 times.
-Using Chart.js, a dynamic multi-currency visualization dashboard was created that incorporates real-time FX rate conversion for over eight major currencies, allowing for historical performance tracking across tens of thousands of global tickers and localized risk assessment.

projects.title: AI Powered NIDS
projects.description:
Developed a production-grade AI-NIDS that modernizes legacy Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) into a modular, real-time intelligence platform. The system captures live network traffic, extracts complex statistical flow features aligned with industry-standard benchmarks, and employs dual-layer Machine Learning (Isolation Forest for zero-day anomalies and Random Forest for known attack patterns). 
 **Key Features:** 
 - ***Real-World Training:*** Integrated kagglehub for automated, memory-safe ingestion and training on 250,000+ records of cleaned CICIDS2017 data.
 - ***Live Observability:*** Built a responsive React/Vite dashboard featuring protocol distribution charts, live traffic volume tracking, and prioritized security alert tables.
 - ***Privacy-First Design:*** Implemented a custom IP-hashing utility on the frontend to anonymize sensitive internal addresses, making the project safe for public portfolio galleries and LinkedIn demos.
 - ***Modular Pipeline:*** Decoupled architecture with a FastAPI backend, SQLite persistence, and a standalone packet-sniffing orchestrated via background threads.

projects.title: Vendor Performance Analysis
projects.description:
Vendor Performance Analysis is a comprehensive, end-to-end Data Analytics project designed to simulate professional, company-standard workflows. The platform enables analysts and stakeholders to:
 - **Build ETL pipelines** by ingesting large CSV datasets into SQLite and performing data cleaning and transformation using Python for efficient processing.
 - **Perform advanced analysis** using Pandas, Matplotlib, and Seaborn, including EDA, inventory turnover calculation, hypothesis testing, and 95% confidence interval evaluation for vendor performance.
 - **Develop interactive dashboards** in Power BI to visualize KPIs such as total sales, gross profit, and unsold inventory capital using advanced DAX and filtering techniques.
 - **Generate actionable insights** by analyzing vendor performance, sales trends, and profitability metrics.
 - **Produce stakeholder reports** with clear, data-driven recommendations.
 **Key Technical Achievements:
 - Implemented scalable ETL workflow integrating SQL and Python for large dataset processing.
 - Applied statistical testing and confidence interval analysis to validate vendor performance differences.
 - Built dynamic Power BI dashboard with complex DAX measures and interactive filtering.
 - Identified high-impact business insights for vendor optimization and inventory efficiency.
 - Delivered a comprehensive business report aligned with real-world decision-making needs.

projects.title: Portfolio Optimization Using Python
projects.description:
Portfolio Optimization in Python is a quantitative finance project focused on identifying the optimal combination of assets to maximize returns while minimizing risk using Modern Portfolio Theory. The implementation leverages the Sharpe Ratio as the primary performance metric to evaluate a diversified portfolio of stocks, bonds, and commodities. The platform enables users to:
 - **Source and prepare financial data** using the yFinance library, compute lognormal daily returns, and construct covariance matrices to analyze asset risk and correlations.
 - **Calculate key performance metrics** including expected return, portfolio volatility (standard deviation), and Sharpe Ratio through custom Python functions.
 - **Optimize portfolio allocation** using scipy minimization techniques by maximizing the Sharpe Ratio under constraints such as total weights summing to 1 and no short-selling bounds.
 - **Integrate external financial data** such as risk-free rates via APIs like the Federal Reserve (FRED).
 - **Analyze portfolio behavior** under different market conditions and time horizons.
 **Key Technical Achievements:
 - Implemented Modern Portfolio Theory with Sharpe Ratio based optimization.
 - Built constrained optimization model using scipy for efficient asset allocation.
 - Integrated real-time financial data from yFinance and FRED APIs.
 - Developed reusable functions for return, volatility, and correlation analysis.
 - Created a scalable framework for data-driven investment decision-making.

projects.title: Credit Risk Analysis
projects.description:
Credit Risk Assessment System is a full-stack data science project focused on building an end-to-end machine learning pipeline for evaluating creditworthiness using the German Credit Data dataset. The project demonstrates a complete workflow from data analysis to deployment, enabling users to:
 - **Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA)** using Pandas, Matplotlib, and Seaborn to uncover relationships between credit risk and demographic/financial variables.
 - **Apply feature engineering and preprocessing** by handling missing values, removing irrelevant features, and encoding categorical variables using Label Encoding.
 - **Train and optimize machine learning models** by implementing Decision Tree, Random Forest, Extra Trees, and XGBoost, with hyperparameter tuning using Grid Search Cross-Validation.
 - **Deploy an interactive application** using Streamlit to allow users to input applicant data and receive real-time credit risk predictions.
 - **Evaluate model performance** and address real-world challenges such as class imbalance in financial datasets.
 **Key Technical Achievements:
 - Built end-to-end ML pipeline from EDA to deployment.
 - Implemented and compared multiple tree-based models for classification.
 - Optimized model performance using Grid Search Cross-Validation.
 - Developed a real-time prediction web app using Streamlit.
 - Addressed class imbalance and improved model reliability for financial decision-making.

skills: AI Systems Engineering: Designing intelligent systems using modern AI architectures. | LLMs, RAG, Fine-tuning, Inference Optimization, LangChain
Backend & Data Systems: Building resilient, high-performance server-side architectures and data pipelines. | FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Vector Databases (ChromaDB, Pinecone), gRPC
Frontend & Product UI: Crafting immersive, high-performance user experiences with modern frameworks. | React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
Cloud & Infrastructure: Architecting scalable, containerized deployments and automated CI/CD pipelines. | AWS, Google Cloud, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform
Quant & ML Operations: Lifecycle management of ML models and quantitative financial analysis. | MLOps, Quant Analytics, Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow
